title: Device Home Screen - Multiple devices - Turning off devices
scenario: Turning off multiple devices one by one shows each as disconnected while others remain connected
steps: Observe that the turned-off device displays as disconnected.
Verify that the remaining devices stay connected.
Observe that this device now displays as disconnected.
Verify that the other remaining devices (if any) stay connected.
Repeat turning off remaining devices one by one.
After each turn-off, confirm the device shows as disconnected and others remain connected.
expected: Each turned-off device displays as disconnected immediately, while all other devices remain connected throughout the process.
